name: tech-priests
title: Tech Priests

description: Tech-Priest logistics drones, Cogitator Stations, Work State tabs, Machine-Spirit ledger traits, emergency machinery, technology-gated infrastructure planning, station-owned defense perimeters, hidden proxy-gun ammo hardening, physical direct-acquisition target guarding, direct resource target/movement locking, movement vector enforcement, movement target reconciliation, command cleanup, and 0.1.654 movement intent authority so active work targets own the movement request and visible intent line before vector correction runs.
